summary: Comprehensive testing of Agent and Specialist features. Backend: 38/38 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core flows working. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in player search pages.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem component with empty string value caused runtime error - FIXED

passed_tests: Backend: Agent registration returns role='agent' (100%)
Backend: Agent login with valid credentials (100%)
Backend: Agent profile GET and PUT (100%)
Backend: Agent player search with filters (100%)
Backend: Agent watchlist add/remove (100%)
Backend: Agent opportunities GET (100%)
Backend: Specialist registration returns role='specialist' (100%)
Backend: Specialist login with valid credentials (100%)
Backend: Specialist profile GET and PUT (100%)
Backend: Specialist player search with filters (100%)
Backend: Specialist client list add/remove (100%)
Backend: GET /api/specialist/types returns types and certifications (100%)
Backend: Admin GET /api/admin/agents (100%)
Backend: Admin approve/verify agent (100%)
Backend: Admin GET /api/admin/specialists (100%)
Backend: Admin approve/verify specialist (100%)
Backend: Admin stats includes total_agents, total_specialists (100%)
Backend: Role-based access control working (403 for wrong roles)
Frontend: Registration page shows 5 role options (Player, Club, Federation, Agent, Specialist)
Frontend: Agent login redirects to /agent/dashboard
Frontend: Agent dashboard shows stats (Watchlist, Opportunities, Verified status)
Frontend: Agent profile page with agency info, license, specializations
Frontend: Agent Search Players page working with filter dropdowns
Frontend: Agent Watchlist page working
Frontend: Agent Opportunities page working
Frontend: Specialist login redirects to /specialist/dashboard
Frontend: Specialist dashboard shows stats (Active Clients, Specialization, Verified status)
Frontend: Specialist profile page with type, certifications, services
Frontend: Specialist Find Players page working
Frontend: Specialist My Clients page working
Frontend: Admin Agents page shows list with Approve/Verify buttons
Frontend: Admin Specialists page shows list with Approve/Verify buttons
Frontend: Admin Dashboard shows Agent and Specialist counts
seed_data_creation: Test agent and specialist users created during registration tests: test_agent_xxx@soccermatch.com, test_specialist_xxx@soccermatch.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Agent and Specialist features fully tested. Registration creates user + profile in respective collection (agents/specialists). Both require admin approval to access all features. Admin can approve and verify both roles. SelectItem empty value bug was fixed by using 'all' as placeholder value instead of empty string.

verified_features.details: Can register as agent role, creates user and agent profile
Can register as specialist role, creates user and specialist profile
Agent portal with Dashboard, Profile, Search Players, Watchlist, Opportunities
Specialist portal with Dashboard, Profile, Find Players, My Clients
Agency name, license, FIFA registration, specializations, experience
Type, certifications, services, languages, availability, rates
Search players with name, position, nationality, level filters
Search players with name, position, nationality, level filters
Add/remove players to watchlist with heart icon
View all club opportunities to match with players
Shows total agents and specialists counts

bug_fixed.description: SelectItem empty value bug in AgentPlayers.js and SpecialistPlayers.js
bug_fixed.root_cause: SelectItem component in shadcn/radix requires non-empty value prop
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed value="" to value="all" for 'All Positions' and 'All Levels' options, updated filter logic to ignore 'all' value
